description: Style Note Every man and boy will love the casual Fit and comfort of these shorts from myntra. Looks very stylish when paired with floaters and casual T-shirt, this one will take care of the monsoon splatter and summer heat in style. Product Details Khaki coloured shorts, has a belt loops around the waist, buttoned closure at the waist with a buttoned fly, two insert pockets in front and two welt pockets at the back Material and care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
